description_long: This is a modern detached house situated on a rectangular plot of green lawn, bordered by a paved road. The house features a dark, low-pitched gable roof and a light-colored facade with large windows, providing ample natural light. The front of the house includes a covered porch supported by columns, with a paved walkway leading to the main entrance. The structure appears to have two stories, with a clear separation between the ground and upper floors. The property is surrounded by a simple landscaping design, with a driveway and minimal decorative elements. The overall appearance is clean, functional, and contemporary, suitable for a suburban neighborhood.
description: A modern two-story house with a dark gable roof, large windows, and a covered front porch, set on a green lawn with a driveway and minimal landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch with columns, and a paved walkway leading from the road.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the side wall, driveway, and the continuation of the lawn with minimal windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrance, a covered patio area, and the full extent of the backyard.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side elevation, additional windows, and the driveway connecting to the road.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered front porch with columns, single main door, and a paved walkway leading from the street
